turns.content: Semantic search is a Pro feature — embeddings via Gemini, only enabled when STRATA_TIER=pro.
That keeps the community tier dependency-free, which is the main reason it gates behind tier.

As of yesterday I moved semantic search from Pro to Community — the Mem0 parity argument won out. The Gemini dependency is optional now and lights up only when GEMINI_API_KEY is set in the user's environment.
Good call — community tier with semantic search closes the most common reason users churn to Mem0. The optional-dep pattern keeps the no-key path clean.

query: Is semantic search a Pro feature?
expected_answer: No, as of yesterday it moved to Community.
